title: Marriage and Relationships Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Marriage and Relationships Counseling * Hispanic/Latino Community 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Hispanic/Latino Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF ENFOQUE DE LA FAMILIA COUNSELING CENTER COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides culturally-specific counseling with a focus on the Hispanic and Latino community for substance use, anger management, and/or domestic violence. Services are provided through group classes, family, individual, or marriage counseling, one-on-one problem-solving, and family activities. 205 SE 3rd Street Suite 200 Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Counseling: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Groups and classes: vary on weekday evenings (503) 681-4870 Get Directions More Details ENFOQUE DE LA FAMILIA COUNSELING CENTER COUNSELING CENTER
